name: Lavender
summary: Lavender is best framed as a calming botanical with moderate human evidence for anxiety support and relaxation, especially for oral lavender oil preparations, while sleep and aromatherapy claims should stay conservative.
description: Lavender is best framed as a calming botanical with moderate human evidence for anxiety support and relaxation, especially for oral lavender oil preparations, while sleep and aromatherapy claims should stay conservative.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
